title: Sussex victorious against Pacaltsdorp United
description: CRICKET NEWS - Sussex made a big statement...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - Sussex made a big statement in the SWD Premier League competition with a 101 bonus point victory against Pacaltsdorp United as the two powerhouses locked horns at the D’Almeida sportsfield on Saturday.


> Sussex posted 201 thanks to a fine knock by Lindle Trim (64), after which the home team dismissed Pacaltsdorp United for 100 with Franco Geldenhuys bagging 4/21.


Despite a half century by Neil Jordan (85), George (137 all out) lost by seven wickets against the Knysna Cavaliers (138/3) at Loerie Park. The captain, JP Ellis - 3/17 with the ball and 45 with the bat - was the hero for the Cavaliers.

At the Bridgton Sport Grounds, the Union Stars I (126/7) consolidated their position at the top of the log with a three-wicket victory against their Oudtshoorn neighbours, the Harlequins Forces (125 all out).

Lee Henry Meyer (4/36) was the top wicket taker for Union Stars I.

Union Stars II (138 all out) won by 38 runs against New Dawn Park (115 all out). For Union Stars II, Elridge Booysen (60 with the bat) and Jean Bruiners (6/19 with the ball) were the stand-out players.

The summarised scorecards

Knysna Cavaliers beat George by 7 wickets:

- George 137 all out (37.1 overs) (Neil Jordan 85, JD de Villiers 26, JP Ellis 3/17, Justin Meyer 2/18).
- Knysna Cavaliers 138/3 (25.6 overs) (Tristan van Zyl 51, JP Ellis 45, PJ Carstens 2/36).

Union Stars I beat Harlequins Forces by 3 wickets:

- Harlequins Forces 125 all out (31.3 overs) (Jacques Campher 32, Marco Jansen 29, Cameron Avontuur 23, Lee Henry Meyer 4/36, Reagon Rhode 2/15, Grant Esau 2/20).
- Union Stars I 126/7 (32.3 overs) (Thurston Murphy 40*, Breyton Plaatjies 31, Keenan Arries 30, Jermaine le Kay 2/25, Herchel America 2/41).

Sussex beat Pacaltsdorp United by 101 runs:

- Sussex 201 all out (37.6 overs) (Lindl Trim 64, Franco Geldenhuis 33, Anoxolo Kitshini 3/32, Charl Francios Marais 2/28, Ricardo Majolla 2/34).
- Pacaltsdorp United 100 all out (30.1 overs) (Kurt Botha 38, Zayd Jacobs 20,Franco Geldenhuis 4/21, Kamvalethu Feni 2/5).

Union Stars II beat New Dawn Park by 23 runs:

- Union Stars II 138 all out (44.3 overs) (Elridge Booysen 60, Jayver Philander 23, Roberto Davids 3/16, Brandon Scheepers 3/31, Melvin Baadtjies 2/37)
- New Dawn Park 115 all out (31.2 overs) (Marshall Basterman 32, James Bruiners 6/19, Ziano Lewis 2/30, Elridge Booysen 2/35).

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
